Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development corp. is present. Represented by Ledell Stewart.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Thoma is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. (501)
